## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution
What should happen? Be specific about the UI, behavior, and data.

## Alternative Solutions
What alternatives have you considered?

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## Mockups
Attach Figma links or screenshots.
